      "それはママアイーシャのレストランの外壁にあるという特徴があります。",

      "それは地域社会、レストラン、芸術、そして人々との架け橋を作るために使われます。",
      "それは大衆と一般の人々が利用できる壁画芸術を展示するために使われます。"

HasA: It has eleven American Presidents featured.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by featuring American Presidents.
It is characterized by its location on the exterior wall of Mama Ayesha's restaurant.
It is characterized by depictions of the White House.
It is characterized by the owner of the restaurant standing in the middle.
It is characterized by a bald eagle in the upper left corner.
It is characterized by trees losing their leaves in the Fall season.
It is characterized by the Lincoln Memorial in the background.
It is characterized by cherry blossom trees in bloom by the White House.
It is characterized by the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on the right side.
It is characterized by a mosaic of the United States Flag on either side.
UsedFor: It is used for celebrating a historical moment in American History.
It is used for teaching the history of the Presidents for schools, children and the public.
It is used for public viewing for generations to come.
It is used for making a bridge between the community, the restaurant, the arts and the people.
It is used for displaying mural art available for the public and for the masses.
LocatedIn: It is located in Washington, D.C.
It is located on the exterior wall of Mama Ayesha's, a Middle Eastern restaurant.
It is located in the Adams Morgan neighborhood.
It is located on Calvert Street.
It is located near the eastern end of the Duke Ellington Bridge.
CreatedBy: It was created by El Salvador-born artist Karla Rodas.
ConsistsOf: It consists of eleven American Presidents.
It consists of selected United States Presidents standing in front of the White House.
It consists of the owner of the restaurant standing in the middle.
It consists of a bald eagle flying in the upper left corner.
It consists of trees losing their leaves in the Fall season.
It consists of the Lincoln Memorial in the background.
It consists of cherry blossom trees in bloom by the White House.
It consists of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
It consists of the Jefferson Memorial.
It consists of the Washington Monument.
KnownFor: It is known for being DC's largest postcard.
It is known for depicting eleven American Presidents.
It is known for its prominent location in Washington, D.C.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mama Ayesha's Restaurant.
It is associated with the Adams Morgan neighborhood.
It is associated with Karla Rodas.
It is associated with the D.C. Commission on the Arts and Humanities.
It is associated with the National Endowment for the Arts.
It is associated with private donors.
It is associated with Mama Ayesha's family members.
It is associated with Helen Thomas.
It is associated with the P.A.B.C. initiative.
It is associated with the Washington City Paper's "Best of D.C."
About: It is about the White House.
It is about the Lincoln Memorial.
It is about the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
It is about the Jefferson Memorial.
It is about the Washington Monument.
It is about the United States Capitol.
It is about the United States Flag.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the P.A.B.C. initiative.
It was influenced by the support of the community.
It was influenced by the help of the DC Commission.
It was influenced by the Restaurant Mama Ayesha's.
It was influenced by all the entities who funded the project.
Influenced: It influenced the idea that mural art is available for the public and for the masses.
